description: Ship a feature end-to-end with a parallel agent team. An explorer splits the work into non-overlapping implementer arms, a judge gates merges, then a test-writer and code-reviewers run in parallel before the orchestrator integrates and pushes. Use for production work.

feature.description: What is being built — be specific enough for the explorer to decompose

plan.description: Path to a plan file or description of what to build. Explorer reads this first.

lint_cmd_default.description: Default lint command if explorer cannot determine a better one per arm

base_branch.description: The branch to merge integration/{team} back into after all work is done (e.g. main, develop, feature/xyz)

implementer_model.description: Model for implementer arms. Default Sonnet works out-of-the-box. For ~3x cost savings at similar quality, set to gpt-4o-mini (requires Codex CLI). The explorer passes this through when bonding arms.

steps.title: [{{team}}] explore + decompose: {{feature}}
steps.description: Map the codebase for {{feature}}. Decompose into implementer arms with non-overlapping file boundaries. Bond one implement-arm per arm. Set cross-arm dependencies in beads where arm B needs arm A's output. Report decomposition to orchestrator. Model: haiku.

steps.title: [{{team}}] judge: verify all implementations
steps.description: Judge all implementer arms (attempt 1 of 3). VERDICT: PASS unblocks test + review. VERDICT: FAIL → reopen failed arm(s), retry. Max 3 attempts. Model: sonnet.

steps.title: [{{team}}] test-writer: write tests for {{feature}}
steps.description: Write colocated tests for all new source files across all arms. Run the repo's test command (vitest, jest, deno test, pytest, etc.) and confirm tests pass. Model: haiku.

steps.title: [{{team}}] code-review: integration/{{team}} branch
steps.description: Run code review on integration/{{team}} branch. Report P1/P2 findings to orchestrator. Model: sonnet.

steps.title: [{{team}}] codex-review: correctness + spec-adherence pass on integration/{{team}}
steps.description: Run Codex CLI (gpt-4o-mini) against the changed files on integration/{{team}} branch. Review for: correctness (wrong variables, missing fields), spec adherence, missing edge cases, obvious bugs. Report P1/P2. Do NOT edit files. Runs in parallel with code-review. Model: gpt-4o-mini (Codex CLI). Skip this step gracefully if codex is not installed.

steps.title: [{{team}}] integrate: merge arms, merge to base branch, clean up
steps.description: 1. Create integration/{{team}}, merge all arm + test-writer branches into it. 2. Fix P1 findings from code-review AND codex-review. 3. Push integration/{{team}} to origin. 4. Checkout base branch, merge integration/{{team}} into it, push base branch. 5. Delete all agent/{{team}}/* and integration/{{team}} local branches. 6. Remove all worktrees with bd worktree remove. 7. Close remaining open beads issues.
